name: Venda (1979–1994)

colors.symbolism: the central stripe and the land

description: Three horizontal stripes — green (top, broader), yellow, blue (in the lower portion) — with a sun device.
history: Flag of Venda, one of the four nominally independent 'Bantustans' created by apartheid-era South Africa as a 'homeland' for the Venda-speaking people. Independence declared 13 September 1979, internationally unrecognised. Reincorporated into South Africa in 1994.
